testcase.name: example_tm_a_mmrm.Rd
testcase.system-out: values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. testcase.name: example_tm_g_pp_patient_timeline.Rd
testcase.system-out: variables has eager choices (character) while datasets has dynamic choices.
